title: FDA's Makary on Trump EO to Ease Access to Psychedelics
summary: FDA Commissioner Dr. Marty Makary discusses President Trump's Executive Order aimed at faster research and access to psychedelics, citing promising research and calling this an 'historic moment.' He talks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO's McCormick Says It's Still Right to Be Long Dollar
summary: BMO Chief FX Strategist Mark McCormick says the right trade is to be long dollar for now. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michael Baron Discusses RONB, Musk, & SpaceX
summary: Michael Baron, co-president and portfolio manager at Baron Capital, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss Baron Capital's entrance into the ETF space and the firm's investment in SpaceX.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USFR: Ultrashort-Dated Floating-Rate Treasuries For Liquidity

Caesars Extends Talks for $18 Billion Takeover by Golden Nugget Owner
summary: Caesars Entertainment Inc. has extended a period of exclusive talks about an $18 billion takeover by Tilman Fertitta as new details about the deal emerge.

title: Agnico Expands in Finland With C$3.7 Billion Gold Deal Trio
summary: Agnico Eagle Mines Ltd. plans to spend C$3.7 billion ($2.7 billion) to acquire three gold projects in northern Finland, expanding the Canadian miner’s footprint in the Scandinavian country.
